factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The setting hints at lifestyle or use, but the functional relationship is not fully clear.
A specific benefit of durability is clearly communicated through the text.
The eye path is obvious, and text is readable without distractions.
Texture and construction details of the case are clearly visible.
The brand name is prominently displayed, providing a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and sharp subject boundaries make the creative readable.
The image has clear campaign intent with explicit ad copy and brand context.
